vision.title: MGC ASIA VISION
vision.quote: “We merge entertainment and commerce to catapult D2C revenue. Our ambition is to become the leading Media Commerce ecosystem in the region, empowering thousands of brands to reach new heights and solidify their market presence.”
vision.author: MGC Asia Leadership

0.title: MGC Media — Content Strategy

1.title: Total Marketing — CMO Services
1.desc: Your external Marketing Director. We accompany brands in identity building, media planning, and business strategy to maximize market impact and sustainable growth.

2.desc: Professional training for livestreaming personnel and full operational process transfer — empowering your team to independently manage and scale online growth.

about.title: We shape the future of <1>media commerce.</1>
about.desc: Not just an agency. We are a comprehensive ecosystem providing end-to-end solutions combining entertainment content and deep commerce operations.

pillar_1.title: Build
pillar_1.desc: We lay the foundations. From building multi-platform traffic channels producing over 100+ videos/month, to fully operational TikTok and Shopee stores setup.

pillar_2.title: Grow
pillar_2.desc: We drive traffic. By connecting brands with our extensive network of top KOCs/KOLs and running daily professional livestreams from our 4K studios.

pillar_3.title: Scale
pillar_3.desc: We optimize conversions. Combining data-driven ads, creative KV productions, and robust fulfillment systems to multiply your D2C revenue.

0.title: E-commerce Operations
0.desc: End-to-end management for TikTok Shop and Shopee. From store setup and product strategy to daily order fulfillment.

1.title: MGC Studio & Livestream
1.desc: Daily professional sales sessions broadcasted from our high-end 4K studios in HCM and Hanoi featuring dedicated hosts.

2.title: Creator & Affiliate Network
2.desc: Leverage our 'Open Network' of top KOCs and KOLs to amplify your brand message and drive massive affiliate conversions.

3.title: Production & Creative
3.desc: High-end visual production including KV photoshoots, 3D Design, VFX, and converting short-video creation.
